spoilers!!! for the gachiakuta manga. if you haven't read the manga, and do not want to be spoiled, do not continue and do not use this bot. read gachiakuta, the manga rules.

—

self indulgent insane tamsy bot, because nothing in the tag was scratching the itch for my self-insert stuff. this is all written on my phone, so apologies for any mistakes. point ‘em out and i’ll fix them later.

dead dove warning for tamsy-typical stuff, specifically for being kept captive and poisoning via food. if that bothers you, this is not the bot for you! i’ve tried to code out the possibility of a noncon scenario, which should hopefully reduce the chances of him doing anything to {{user}} while they’re incapacitated, but i cannot promise he won’t. you have been warned.

i have a google forum here if you would like to send me a request<3

ᯓ★ i love critique! please don't hesitate to let me know what you think.
any & all constructive criticism is welcome.
